---
title: Motor Shield V2.0
description: An Arduino-compatible shield for controlling two DC motors.
---

# Motor Shield V2.0

## Product Description

The shield uses L298P as its main motor controller.

## Features

- Two motor outputs
- Supply Voltage: 6V to 15V

## Specifications

| Specification | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Main Chip | L298P |
| Maximum current | 2A per channel |

## Pinout

| Pin | Name | Function |
| --- | --- | --- |
| D8 | DIR_A | Motor A direction |
| D9 | PWM_A | Motor A speed |

## Play With Arduino

Install the shield with power removed, then upload the motor example.

## Resources

- [Schematic](https://files.seeedstudio.com/motor-shield-v2-schematic.pdf)
